typography.guidelines: Use Outfit for all headings (H1-H6) and primary display text. Use Plus Jakarta Sans for body text, forms, and smaller UI elements. Ensure high legibility.

colors.guidelines: The theme is strictly dark. Never use pure white or pure black; use tinted dark purples/blues. Primary accent is a vibrant electric purple. Provide depth using glassmorphism, not flat colors.

classes..glass-panel: background: var(--bg-glass); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); border: 1px solid var(--border-glass); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-glass);
classes..glass-card: background: var(--bg-glass); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid var(--border-glass); border-radius: 12px; transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease;
classes..glass-card:hover: transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px 0 var(--glow-purple); border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); background: var(--bg-glass-hover);

classes..smooth-transition: transition: background-color 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease, border-color 0.3s ease;

motion.keyframes: @keyframes fadeInUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

background_layer.style: Use a deep gradient mesh or radial gradient on the body to avoid flat black. Example: background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0%, #1a1025 0%, var(--bg-root) 70%);
background_layer.layout: Applied to body or a fixed background div.

login_card.layout: Centered vertically and horizontally using Bootstrap '.d-flex .align-items-center .justify-content-center .min-vh-100'.
login_card.style: Use '.glass-panel' with a max-width: 400px; padding: 2rem;. Inputs should have transparent backgrounds, bottom borders or subtle full borders with focus rings in '--primary-purple'.
login_card.button: Pill-shaped or rounded-3. Background: '--primary-purple'. Glow effect on hover.

dashboard_greeting.typography: H1 using '--font-heading', tracking-tight. Dynamic text based on time. Include a subtle gradient text effect on the user's name: background-clip: text, -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent, linear-gradient(90deg, #A855F7, #C084FC).
dashboard_greeting.layout: Placed at the top of the dashboard inside a container with generous top padding (pt-5).

date_picker.style: Do NOT use default unstyled browser date picker. Wrap it in a '.glass-panel' container. Style the native input with dark background, purple accent, and custom calendar icon.
date_picker.layout: Centered or left-aligned next to the 'View Notes' button. Use Bootstrap grids or flexbox for alignment. Add a prominent 'View Notes' primary button.

file_cards.style: Use '.glass-card'. Inside: Icon on top/left, filename (truncate if too long), action buttons at bottom. Icons should be distinct for PDF, DOCX, PPTX, etc.
file_cards.actions: Use Bootstrap '.btn .btn-sm'. View button (outline), Download button (solid purple).

empty_state.style: Subtle, centered text with a low-opacity icon (e.g., Phosphor empty folder icon). Use '--text-secondary'.
empty_state.layout: Centered in the main view area with plenty of padding.

back_button.style: Minimalistic outline or ghost button. Use '.btn-outline-light' with low opacity border, or custom glass styling. Icon on the left.
back_button.layout: Placed at the top-left of the Dashboard and Notes Viewer pages.

layouts.general: Always wrap main content in a '.container' or '.container-fluid'. Use generous spacing (e.g., '.py-5', '.gap-4'). Implement a responsive grid.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Bootstrap 5 utility classes for layout, spacing, and typography.
Add the custom CSS variables and glassmorphism classes to a global 'styles.css' file.
Implement the pages as pure HTML files (index.html, dashboard.html, notes.html) avoiding frameworks like React.
Write vanilla JavaScript in a separate file (e.g., app.js) to handle the login simulation, time-based greeting, and date selection logic.
Include Phosphor Icons via CDN for modern, clean iconography. Example: <script src="https://unpkg.com/@phosphor-icons/web"></script>
Ensure the background has a subtle radial gradient or animated mesh to enhance the premium feel, rather than just flat black.
Avoid the generic Bootstrap look by applying the custom glassmorphism classes instead of standard Bootstrap cards.
Ensure inputs and selects in the login form and date picker are heavily styled to match the dark glass theme, removing default white backgrounds and blue focus rings.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container in a way that disrupts natural reading flow.
Use modern button styles (pill-shaped or rounded) with interaction animations.
NEVER use pure white or pure black text/backgrounds. Always tint them slightly.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='view-notes-button').
Never use pure transparent backgrounds over content for dropdowns/modals; use glassmorphism with blur.
Avoid generic Bootstrap looks by aggressively overriding borders, shadows, and background colors with the provided CSS variables.
